amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 72 — paragraph 2 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 72 — paragraph 2 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

2 a. non-compliance of the AI system with the requirements laid down in Article 10 shall be subject to administrative fines of up to 1 000 000 EUR.
parliament_text: 2 a. non-compliance of the AI system with the requirements laid down in Article 10 shall be subject to administrative fines of up to 1 000 000 EUR.
